text:
Created attachment 166032
converters/py27-unidecode-0.04.19.diff

Update converters/py-unidecode to 0.04.19.

"portlint -C" reports "looks fine."
I will attach the "poudriere testport" log.

From ChangeLog:

2016-01-21      unidecode 0.04.19

        * Add unidecode_expect_ascii() and unidecode_expect_nonascii()
          functions for performance critical applications.
          (thanks to Israel Saeta Perez)
